World.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
World.desc: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

World.title: Katya Adler: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
World.desc: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States  reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

World.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
World.desc: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

World.title: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
World.desc: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.

World.title: Epstein survivor: Meeting the King would be a 'grand step'
World.desc: A Buckingham Palace source confirmed the Royals will not meet with survivors of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein during their state visit to the US.

World.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
World.desc: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.

Technology.title: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
Technology.desc: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.

Technology.title: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
Technology.desc: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.

Technology.title: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
Technology.desc: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.

Technology.title: Biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
Technology.desc: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.

Technology.title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
Technology.desc: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

Technology.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
Technology.desc: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.

Science.title: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
Science.desc: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

Science.title: Meet the 19-metre octopus that prowled the ancient seas
Science.desc: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.

Science.title: Ban 'forever chemicals' in uniforms and frying pans, MPs urge
Science.desc: School uniforms and non-stick pans are some of the everyday products that should stop using chemicals called PFAS, MPs say.

Science.title: Electricity bills targeted in planned shakeup to energy pricing
Science.desc: The war in the Middle East has brought renewed attention to Britain's vulnerability to energy price shocks.

Science.title: Artemis II crew: 'We left as friends - we came back as best friends'
Science.desc: The four crew members gave their first press conference since they splashed down nearly a week ago, and emphasised hope and unity.

Science.title: Butterfly numbers are dropping but here are five species you may see more of
Science.desc: A warming climate has helped some to flourish, researchers say, but the outlook is troubling.
